entity.summary: Manta ecosystem concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange positioned as a modular DEX, with spot token swaps, liquidity pools, fee generation, and current exchange-volume activity.
entity.notes: Current first-party Firefly application remains reachable as a JavaScript exchange interface. DefiLlama independently classifies Firefly as an audited CLMM DEX on Manta and reports current TVL, recent fees, recent DEX volume, and cumulative DEX volume. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party protocol documentation was not recovered during this review pass.

evidence.title: Firefly official application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party Firefly application endpoint remains reachable and serves the JavaScript exchange interface.

evidence.title: Firefly metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies Firefly as an audited CLMM DEX on Manta and reports current TVL, recent fees, recent DEX volume, and cumulative DEX volume.

evidence.title: Firefly DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Firefly as a Manta decentralized exchange; duplicate registry rows are consolidated into this entity.
